item.title: Tiny Land Children's Play Tents Recalled Due to Risk of Injury from Irritation to Skin and Eyes
item.company: Online at Amazon.com and Tinylandus.com from November 2025 through March 2026 for between $54 and $70.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com and Tinylandus.com from November 2025 through March 2026 for between $54 and $70.
item.summary: This recall involves Tiny Land-branded children's play tents. The play tents are made of a cream-colored fabric and have three windows, a closable fabric door, 34 poles, star-shaped lights, and a quilted play mat. When assembled, the tents measure about 57 inches high, 52 inches wide and 36 inches deep. The Tiny Land logo and "SKU TLTGTT003BG-XYF1506251" are printed on a label stitched inside of the tent.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Children's Tiny Land Play Tents.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the tents immediately, disassemble the tents and place the poles in an area where children cannot access them. Consumers should contact Tiny Land to receive a free repair kit with a set of four plastic replacement poles, including shipping. Consumers will be asked to dispose of the tent's fiberglass poles, using gloves, in accordance with state and local waste disposal procedures.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
